# KP Solutions

> Custom software for established operators. Websites are one deliverable shape among many; the product is software that solves operational problems. KP Solutions is a one-person bespoke software studio based in Loughborough, in the East Midlands, UK, working operator-to-operator (and remotely across the UK) rather than agency-to-procurement.

## Canonical pages

- [Home](https://kpsolutions.io/): Overview of KP Solutions and how the studio works.
- [Services](https://kpsolutions.io/services): The five shapes of bespoke software — custom platforms, internal tools, AI-visible web presence, integrations & automation, and phased legacy replacement.
- [Work](https://kpsolutions.io/work): Potter Sanctuary — a residency-booking platform with payments, customer accounts, and operator tooling, built and shipped in four weeks.
- [Process](https://kpsolutions.io/process): How we build — discovery, design, build, and launch; scoped comprehensively, fixed fee, code owned by you.
- [Contact](https://kpsolutions.io/contact): How to start a conversation about a project.
